TextENGNew: And then, a few days later, on Sunday morning.
``Mmm... is it morning already?@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11019. Morning? ...Wait, what?!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11020. I-it's already this late?!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11021. M-Mom, why didn't you wake me up?!``

``...Oh right, they said they were leaving for Tokyo first thing this morning!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11023. Oh no, I overslept! I'm going to be late!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11024. Why did it have to be this morning of all mornings?!``
I'd been so excited about today that I couldn't fall asleep last night, which is exactly why I overslept... Damn, what a blunder!
``If I remember right, we're meeting directly at the community pool today.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11026. If I leave right now, I can still make it in time!``
``Bag, check! Doors, locked!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11028. All right, here I gooo! Oryaaaaah!!``
I slung my pre-packed knapsack over my shoulder, hopped on my bicycle, and took off toward Okinomiya...
The road from Hinamizawa to Okinomiya is all downhill, so once I pick up speed, I can really fly.
When I first checked the clock I'd panicked, but at this pace I'd clearly make it in time.
The forests and woodlands gradually gave way to rice paddies and houses, and as the road leveled out, I knew I was already in Okinomiya.

``All right, I've reached Okinomiya!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11030. Let me check the time... Oh, I've got plenty to spare!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11031. It's all downhill from here anyway, so I don't even need to stand-pedal!``

``Phew. I charged here at full speed, but even a moment's delay could have been fatal.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11033. It's not that being late is a problem in itself, but if I'm the only one who shows up late, Mion will definitely call for a punishment game.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11034. Best not to give her any openings...``
That fear alone is what drove me to sprint the whole way.
...But even though I knew I'd make it on time... somehow, the dark clouds in my heart refused to clear.
``...?@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11036. ...That's strange.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11037. I've had this terrible feeling gnawing at me for a while now.``
A terrible feeling... the only thing I could think of was arriving late, getting slapped with a punishment, and being forced into some embarrassing swimsuit.
...Wearing something humiliating like that in front of everyone? Absolutely not...

``But as long as I'm not late, there's no reason they'd make me wear anything weird...@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11039. So I should be able to head into the pool wearing the trunks I brought with me...@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11040. ...Hm? ...Aaaaah?!?!``
Th-that's right, I completely forgot!

I remember now -- when I checked my trunks yesterday, I noticed some weird stain on them... I figured the others would tease me mercilessly if I left it, so I had Mom wash them again... and I left them hanging out to dry?!
``D-d-don't tell me I left my trunks...?!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11042. ...NOOOOO!! I really did forget them!!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11043. The one thing I forgot was my truuuunks... NOOOOOO!!``
No matter how desperately I rummaged through my bag, my trunks were nowhere to be found.
``Wh-what should I do?@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11045. Getting to Okinomiya was fast since it's downhill, but if I go back for my trunks, the round trip would take forever...!``

``D-does the community pool sell swim trunks?!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11047. ...Nah, a government-run pool wouldn't sell anything like that!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11048. What do I do, what do I do?! At this rate, at this rate...!``
``Oh, forgot your swimsuit, Kei-chan?@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1024. Then why don't you just swim in the buff~?``
``As if I could do that!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11050. ...Wait, R-Rena?``
``H-hau~, Keiichi-kun's fur seal is sooo kyute, I'm gonna take you hoooome~!!``
``G-g-gah, what's with that tongue stretching out like a chameleon?! Are you trying to devour me?!``
``That's not true at all -- just a teensy little nibble~♪``
``Y-your wide-open mouth is not very convincing right now!!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11053. Gyaaaaaaa!!!``

"...H-how terrifying.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11055. Even just imagining it is horrifying!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11056. If it actually happened, it would be even worse—unbearably so!!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11057. Wh-what do I do?! What am I supposed to DOOOO?!"
Despite the midsummer heat, goosebumps crawled across my entire body. All I could do was cower and tremble under the crushing weight of fear and despair...
Just then, I heard a warm voice calling out to my pathetic, quivering self.
"S-so, let me get this straight.@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1002. You're heading to the pool but you forgot your swim trunks?@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1003. That's quite a pickle..."
"Huh?@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11059. Oh—h-hello! You're the toy shop owner.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11060. Wait, I ended up right in front of Mion's uncle's shop?"
"I overheard everything...@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1005. Well, more like you were rolling around out here making such a racket that I couldn't help but hear."
We'd caused so much havoc in this shop during Mion's club activities that the owner apparently recognized me on sight.
...Or rather, it seems I'd been shouting about my situation out loud this whole time...
The old man seemed to already have a thorough understanding of my predicament.

"W-was I talking to myself again?@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11062. ...N-never mind that.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11063. You're right on the money.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11064. Going back to Hinamizawa now would take way too long...@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11065. Is there anywhere around here where I can buy swim trunks...?!"
"Hahahahaha.@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1007. Well then, you're in luck.@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1008. Come here a moment, Maebara-kun."
The man gave a hearty laugh and beckoned me into his shop.
...I couldn't imagine a toy shop selling swim trunks, though...

"Ta-da! What do you think? Brand new.@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1010. I'd like to give these to you as a gift, Maebara-kun.@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1011. Consider it thanks for always livening up the events at my shop."
"O-...ohhh, swim trunks!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11068. The pattern is kind of weird, like a burglar's wrapping cloth, but at this point I don't care!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11069. I'm in your debt, sir!!"
"Heh heh heh.@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1013. The truth is, these aren't just any ordinary swim trunks.@k@|@y@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1014. ...They're magical swim trunks, imbued with a hidden power."
"Excuse me? M-...magical?"

"That's right. These magical trunks are known by another name: the 'Ladies' Man Swim Trunks.'@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1016. Write your name on them and play in the pool for three hours, and a spell of irresistible charm will be cast on the wearer."
"Uh... that sounds pretty suspicious..."

"I know, right? Pretty fishy.@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1018. I acquired them through a certain channel. They only just arrived at the shop.@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1019. I was a bit nervous about testing whether the magic was real by trying them myself.@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1020. But then, conveniently enough, you showed up out front saying you forgot your trunks, and I thought this was my chance."
"...So basically...@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11073. you want to use me as a guinea pig to test whether these 'Ladies' Man Swim Trunks' are actually magical...?"
"Suspicious, right?@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1022. But you forgot your trunks!@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1023. You don't exactly have a choice, do you?"
"You've gotta be kidding me.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11075. I'd rather be late looking for a store that sells trunks than become a test subject for your sketchy magical swimwear!"
"I don't think you'll find any stores like that nearby, though.@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1025. ...Oh, and by the way, Mion-chan came by this morning to pick up a pair of swim trunks she'd ordered."
"...Huh? Mion bought swim trunks?@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11077. Swim trunks are usually for guys, aren't they?"

"Yep. So I'm pretty sure those were meant for you to wear.@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1027. They had this bold, puffed-up swan design... Definitely looked like punishment game material.@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1028. And specifically for you."
"Wh-wh-WHAAAAAT?!"

"Aren't you running out of time?@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1030. If you're late, they'll just use that as an excuse for the punishment, right?@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1031. So it's either the Ladies' Man Trunks or the embarrassing swan trunks. Which will it be? Hmm~?"
D-d-damn it!
Mion's uncle... He wasn't a Sonozaki for nothing...
The way he cornered you into a choice that wasn't really a choice at all was exactly like Mion!
"So what'll it be, Keiichi Maebara-kun? Hmm?"
"...I-I'd rather go with the magical trunks..."

"That's the spirit!@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1034. And hey, if the magic turns out to be real, you'll be irresistible from now on!@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1035. Write your name on the tag inside the trunks, wear them for three hours at the pool, and the charm spell will settle into your body!@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1036. After that, the magic will stay with you even after you take them off."
"...Nothing to lose either way, but if it's actually true... that would be incredible...!"

"Right?! If it turns out to be real, I'll try them myself!@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1038. So you're my guinea pig!@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1039. For me, you're the test subject.@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1040. For you, these are today's swim trunks.@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1041. See? A win-win, don't you think?@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1042. Come on now, if you don't decide soon, it'll be punishment game time!"
"F-...fine.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11082. I'll borrow those trunks..."

"Great, great!@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1044. Now, apparently you're supposed to sew a piece of cloth with your name on it inside the trunks—but I've already attached the cloth, so all you need to do is write your name.@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1045. Here, a permanent marker!"
"...This feels less like writing my name and more like signing a deal with the devil...@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11084. Keiichi Maebara... there."
"Oh, and one more thing. During the three hours before the charm magic takes hold in your body, there will apparently be trials."
"T-trials?!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11086. You should have mentioned that earlier!"

"Sorry, sorry. Apparently, the grudges of unpopular men also dwell within these trunks.@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1048. During those three hours, they'll try every trick in the book to pull your trunks off."

"This has gone way past suspicious—these trunks sound seriously dangerous...@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11088. Damn, but I've got no other choice!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11089. What's some curse for three measly hours?!"

"That's the spirit!@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1050. Survive those three hours, and the Ladies' Man magic will take root in your body!@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1051. Pretty thrilling challenge, don't you think?!"
"...So basically, you want to use me to find out just how scary these 'grudge trials' really are..."
"Well, that's about the size of it!@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1053. Hahahahaha! Let me know how it goes, okay?@k@vS23/00/VTH_yoshiro1054. Just wash the trunks before you return them!"
"Yeah, yeah, yeaaah!!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11092. Swim trunks acquired—now I just need to dash to the public pool!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11093. Let's gooooo!"
There was no time to waste. I stuffed the trunks into my bag and sprinted toward the public pool at full speed.
"Phew, I-I made it..."

"Now, where are the changing lockers...@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11096. Oh, there they are.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11097. The meeting spot was supposed to be by the water slide after changing.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11098. For now, let me change into these 'Ladies' Man Swim Trunks'..."
At times like these, being a guy with an easy outfit change is a real advantage! I slipped on the so-called 'Ladies' Man Swim Trunks.'
"...For how suspicious they look, they feel surprisingly normal to wear.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11100. Nothing seems particularly different."
"According to the old man, the grudges of unpopular guys are supposed to attack me over the next three hours, trying to strip these trunks off... But it seems fine."
Nobody in the changing room showed any sign of suddenly attacking me, and the sixth sense I'd honed through countless battles was telling me nothing was amiss.
"So... if I just wear these for three hours, I become irresistible? Really...?"

When I'd been pressured into it earlier, I'd gone along with the story despite its fishiness—but now that I was actually wearing them, I was starting to wonder if I'd just been teased with a tall tale.
If the story was true, by the time our pool outing was over, I'd be completely irresistible.

"Well, even if it's a lie, that's fine.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11104. I managed to dodge the crisis of having no swim trunks.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11105. No matter how you look at it, it's not a bad deal for me.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11106. Now then, I'd better hurry to the meeting spot!"
Pulling myself together, I dashed out through the exit toward the pool.
"Ah, he's here, he's here, Mii-chan!!@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1015. Keiichi-kun is here!"
"He's here! Kei-chan~, over here!!"
"...Keiichi~, you kept us waiting. I'm going pun-pun."
"That's only because Rika woke up too early and got here way ahead of time.@k@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1013. Well, you just barely made it in time!"
"R-right?! I'm safe, right?!"
"...Hmm, unfortunate.@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1027. Hehehe! If you'd been even one second late, I had a special punishment game all ready to go..."
""Hehehe...""
Th-that must be about the embarrassing swan trunks the toy shop owner mentioned...
That was close. I was really glad I hadn't been late...
"Hm? What's wrong, Kei-chan?"
"Oh, it's nothing..."
(Nobody seems to be swooning over me with some charm spell, and nobody's trying to attack me to take my trunks off either.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11110. ...I knew it was just a fishy story.)
"Hm? Keiichi-kun?"
"It's nothing.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11112. Anyway! We got here first thing in the morning!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11113. Let's go all out before it gets crowded!!"
""YEAAAH!!!!"
"Keiichi-kun, Keiichi-kun!@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1020. Let's go on the water slide!!@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1021. There's barely any line right now!!"
"Y-yeah! Whoa...!"
Rena's swimsuit was... a somewhat daring bikini...!
She did look a little embarrassed about it, as expected.
...But really, no outfit is inherently embarrassing!
What matters is whether the person wearing it feels embarrassed.
...In that sense, regardless of what she wore, there was something deeply captivating about Rena's blushing face...!
Ahh, Rena's healthy skin and her cute little belly button...
And her beautiful silhouette, enough to make the Venus de Milo flee barefoot in shame...
...Absolute perfection...
"Kei-chan, how are you going to go down?!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1032. Don't tell me you're just going to slide down normally?"
"O-of course not! First up, I'm going in flat on my back, assault style!!"
Mion's swimsuit was... how should I put it, a peculiar Chinese dress-style swimsuit.
It had a lot of fabric and didn't show much skin, but... how to put it—it was good in its own way...
A splendid fusion of Chinese dress and swimsuit...
And the glimpses of her inner thighs peeking out from under the short front panel were a hundred times more alluring than outright exposure!!
But more than anything, someone needed to do something about those bouncing, jiggling twin melons...!!
"Keiichi-san, going bold right from the start!@k@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1017. I won't be outdone!"
"Hehehe!! What style are you going to go with, Satoko?!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11117. Bring it on!!"
Hmm, after seeing Mion's overflowing volume, Satoko was clearly at a disadvantage... but at her age, the lines already hinting at a bountiful future were not to be underestimated...
And yet her swimsuit's design emphasized her youthfulness, creating an incredible gap...
For anyone with that particular... disposition, this combination would be extremely dangerous...!!
Someone could try to take her home dressed like that.
"...Keiichi, what do you think of my swimsuit?"
"Oh—whoa! WHOA!!"
Her figure still suggested unripe fruit, yet she wore a daring bikini—talk about impressive...!
And the key was the strings! It was all about the strings!!
Those side strings!! Every man dreams of pulling them at least once!!
Ahhh, I wanted to pull them, wanted to pull theeeem!!
And then, and then, and then...
There it was—the "school swimsuit tan lines"!!
"...K-Keiichi-san, that's all you've been thinking about while looking at us in our swimsuits."
"Such a filthy Keiichi should go first.@k@|@y@vS23/05/VTH_rika1020. ...Hiyah☆"
"Wait, WHAAAAT?!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11120. It's my turn already?!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11121. G-GAAAAHHHH!!"
"—Wah, blub?!"
...True to my word, I got to experience the pool's main attraction, the long slide, going upside-down and on my back... thoroughly...
"Au au, I wish you'd rate my swimsuit too."
"What do you think? This swimsuit I've been saving for a special occasion?"
"...Keiichi already went down."
"Auu? N-no waaay..."
"Besides, no matter how dressed up you get, nobody can see you."
"And what even is that half-baked kimono? It looks like something a female pearl diver would wear."
"H-how rude to call it half-baked!@k@vS23/12/VTH_hanyu1012. This is my old swimsuit, given a modern makeover!"
"...I can really tell you're from ancient times.@k@vS23/05/VTH_rika1025. Even your fashion sense is frozen in the past..."
"Ahahaha! Man, this is so fun~!@k@|@y@vS23/03/VTH_mion1034. Good times, good times—hm?"
"What is it, Mii-chan?"
"...Did they just call my name over the PA?"
"Paging a guest.@k@vS23/00/VTH_uke1002. Mion Sonozaki-sama. Mion Sonozaki-sama, you have a phone call.@k@vS23/00/VTH_uke1003. Please come to the central office."
"Oh—you're right.@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1024. They're calling for you, Mii-chan."

"I'll head over to the office for a sec.@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1037. I wonder what it could be—the only one who knows I'm here today is Granny.@k@|@y@vS23/03/VTH_mion1038. ...Don't tell me something serious happened."
"Go ahead and check it out.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11124. We'll just mess around until you're back."
"Yeah. Sorry about this.@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1040. Have fun without me."
Mion climbed out of the pool and headed toward the office.
"I wonder if something happened..."
"...If they went to the trouble of paging her at the pool, it must be something important."
"I hope it's not something so urgent that she has to leave early..."
"Yeah...@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11126. We only just started, too..."
With that thought, I offered a quiet prayer that the rest of this fun day would continue without incident.
But I had completely forgotten.
That the swim trunks I was wearing were a dangerous item harboring suspicious magical power...
